data_points.name_en: General basis for preparation of the sustainability statement
data_points.description: 제3항: 기업은 지속가능성 보고서의 작성 기준을 공개하여야 한다. 제4항(목적): 기업이 지속가능성 보고서를 작성하는 방법을 이해하기 위하여, 통합 범위, 상류 및 하류 가치 사슬 정보, 및 해당하는 경우, 기업이 다음 문단의 d) 및 e) 항목에 언급된 정보 생략 옵션 중 하나를 사용했는지 여부를 포함하여, 지속가능성 보고서의 작성 기준을 공개하여야 한다.

data_points.name_ko: 통합 또는 개별 기준 준비 여부
data_points.name_en: Whether the sustainability statement has been prepared on a consolidated or individual basis
data_points.description:
지속가능성 보고서가 통합 기준 또는 개별 기준으로 준비되었는지 여부를 공시해야 합니다. 

(a) 지속가능성 보고서가 통합 기준 또는 개별 기준으로 준비되었는지 여부를 공시해야 합니다. 

→ 

(a) 지속가능성 보고서가 통합 기준 또는 개별 기준으로 작성되었는지 여부를 공시해야 합니다.

data_points.name_en: For consolidated sustainability statements
data_points.description: 통합 지속가능성 보고서의 경우: (b) i. 통합 범위가 재무제표와 동일한지 확인, 또는 해당 시 재무제표 작성 불요/제48i조에 따른 통합 지속가능성 보고 준비 선언; ii. 해당 시 Directive 2013/34/EU 제19a(9)조 또는 제29a(8)조에 따라 개별·통합 지속가능성 보고에서 면제된 통합 대상 자회사 표시.

data_points.name_en: Confirmation that the scope of consolidation is the same as for the financial statements
data_points.description: 통합 범위가 재무제표와 동일하다는 확인, 또는 해당되는 경우 재무제표 작성을 요구받지 않거나 Directive 2013/34/EU의 제48i조에 따라 통합 지속가능성 보고를 준비하고 있다는 선언을 공시해야 합니다.

data_points.name_en: Indication of which subsidiary undertakings included in the consolidation are exempted
data_points.description: 해당되는 경우, Directive 2013/34/EU의 제19a(9)조 또는 제29a(8)조에 따라 개별 또는 통합 지속가능성 보고에서 면제된 통합에 포함된 자회사를 표시해야 합니다.

data_points.name_en: To what extent the sustainability statement covers the undertaking's upstream and downstream value chain
data_points.description: 지속가능성 보고서가 기업의 상류 및 하류 가치사슬을 어느 정도까지 다루는지 공시. (c) 지속가능성 보고서가 기업의 상류 및 하류 가치사슬을 어느 정도까지 다루는지 공시 (ESRS 1 제5.1조 참조: 보고 대상 기업 및 가치사슬).

data_points.name_ko: 지적재산권·노하우·혁신 결과 정보 생략 옵션 사용 여부
data_points.name_en: Whether the undertaking has used the option to omit information on intellectual property, know-how or the results of innovation
data_points.description: 지적재산권, 노하우 또는 혁신 결과에 해당하는 특정 정보를 생략하는 옵션 사용 여부 공시. (d) 기업이 지적재산권, 노하우 또는 혁신 결과에 해당하는 특정 정보를 생략하는 옵션을 사용했는지 여부를 공시(참조: ESRS 1 제7.7절 기밀 및 민감 정보 및 지적재산권, 노하우 또는 혁신 결과 정보).

data_points.name_ko: 임박한 발전 또는 협상 중인 사항 공시 면제 사용 여부
data_points.name_en: Whether the undertaking has used the exemption for impending developments or matters in the course of negotiation
data_points.description:
EU 회원국에 기반을 둔 기업의 경우, Directive 2013/34/EU 제19a(3)조 및 제29a(3)조에서 규정한 임박한 발전 또는 협상 중인 사항의 공시 면제를 허용하는 회원국에서 해당 면제를 사용했는지 여부를 공시해야 합니다. 

* "undertakings"는 "기업"으로 번역
* 법률 조항 참조는 그대로 유지 ("Directive 2013/34/EU 제19a(3)조 및 제29a(3)조")
* 기술적 용어는 표준 한국어 용어 사용 ("임박한 발전 또는 협상 중인 사항"으로 번역)
* 자연스럽고 읽기 쉬운 한국어로 번역
* 원문의 구조와 의미를 정확히 보존 

최종 번역: 
EU 회원국에 기반을 둔 기업의 경우, Directive 2013/34/EU 제19a(3)조 및 제29a(3)조에서 규정한 임박한 발전 또는 협상 중인 사항의 공시 면제를 허용하는 회원국에서 해당 면제를 사용했는지 여부를 공시해야 합니다.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 1 – Distinction when describing value chain coverage
data_points.description: AR 1: 지속가능성 보고서에서 기업의 업스트림 및 다운스트림 가치 사슬(ESRS 1의 5.1절 참조)을 어느 정도 다루고 있는지 설명할 때, 기업은 다음을 구분하여 설명할 수 있다: (a) 영향, 위험 및 기회의 물질성 평가가 업스트림 및/또는 다운스트림 가치 사슬에 어느 정도 확장되는지; (b) 정책, 조치 및 목표가 가치 사슬에 어느 정도 확장되는지; 및 (c) 지표에 대한 공개에서 업스트림 및/또는 다운스트림 가치 사슬 데이터를 어느 정도 포함하는지.

data_points.name_en: Extent to which materiality assessment extends to value chain
data_points.description:
AR 1(a): 影響, 위험 및 기회에 대한 중요도 평가가 상류 및/또는 하류 가치 사슬에 미치는 범위. 

다음과 같이 전문적이고 정확한 한국어로 번역할 수 있습니다.

AR 1(a): 영향, 위험 및 기회에 대한 중요도 평가가 업스트림 및/또는 다운스트림 가치 사슬에 미치는 범위.

data_points.name_en: Extent to which policies, actions and targets extend to value chain
data_points.description:
AR 1(b): 그 기업의 정책, 조치 및 목표가 가치 사슬에 미치는 범위.

또는

AR 1(b): 그 기업의 정책, 조치 및 목표가 가치 사슬 전반에 걸쳐 어떻게 확장되는지.

data_points.name_ko: 지표 공시 시 상·하류 가치사슬 데이터 포함 범위
data_points.name_en: Extent to which upstream/downstream value chain data included in metrics
data_points.description: AR 1(c): 지표에 대한 공개에서 상류 및/또는 하류 가치 사슬 데이터를 포함하는 범위

data_points.name_en: Disclosures in relation to specific circumstances
data_points.description: 제6항: 기업은 특정 상황에 관한 정보를 공개하여야 한다. 제7항(목적): 이러한 특정 상황이 지속가능성 보고서의 작성에 미치는 영향을 이해할 수 있도록 한다. 제8항: 기업은 이 정보를 해당 정보에 대한 공개와 함께 보고할 수 있다.

data_points.name_en: Time horizons (medium- or long-term)
data_points.description: 제9조: 기업이 ESRS 1 제6.4조에서 정의한 중장기 시간 지평에서 벗어난 경우, 다음을 설명하여야 한다: (a) 중장기 시간 지평에 대한 정의; 및 (b) 해당 정의를 적용한 이유.

data_points.name_en: Definitions of medium- or long-term time horizons
data_points.description: (a) 중기 또는 장기 시간 지평에 대한 정의

data_points.name_en: Reasons for applying those definitions
data_points.description: (b) 해당 정의를 적용한 이유

data_points.name_en: Value chain estimation
data_points.description: 10항: 지표가 간접적인 출처(예: 부문 평균 데이터 또는 기타 대리변수)를 사용하여 추정된 상류 및/또는 하류 가치 사슬 데이터를 포함하는 경우, 기업은 다음을 수행하여야 한다. (a) 지표를 식별한다. (b) 작성 기준을 설명한다. (c) 결과적인 정확성 수준을 설명한다. 그리고 (d) 해당하는 경우, 향후 정확성을 개선하기 위한 계획된 조치를 설명하여야 한다(ESRS 1 제5장 가치 사슬 참조).

data_points.name_en: Identify the metrics
data_points.description: (a) 측정 지표를 식별한다.

data_points.name_en: Describe the basis for preparation
data_points.description: (b) 작성 기준을 설명한다.

data_points.name_en: Describe the resulting level of accuracy
data_points.description: (c) 그 결과 얻어진 정확성 수준을 설명한다.

data_points.name_en: Planned actions to improve accuracy (where applicable)
data_points.description: (d) 해당하는 경우, 향후 정확도를 개선하기 위한 계획된 조치를 설명하십시오(ESRS 1 제5장 가치 사슬 참조).

data_points.name_en: Sources of estimation and outcome uncertainty
data_points.description:
Para 11: ESRS 1 제 7.2 항에 따라, 기업은 다음을 수행하여야 한다: (a) 측정 불확실성이 높은 정량적 지표와 금전적 금액을 식별한다; (b) 각 항목에 대해: (i) 측정 불확실성의 원천에 대한 정보를 공개한다; 및 (ii) 이를 측정하기 위해 행한 가정, 근사치 및 판단을 공개한다. Para 12: 미래 예측 정보를 공개할 때, 기업은 해당 정보가 불확실하다고 판단할 수 있다.

참고: 
- undertaking: 기업
- ESRS 1: ESRS 1
- Para: Para (변경 없음)
- quantitative metrics: 정량적 지표
- monetary amounts: 금전적 금액
- measurement uncertainty: 측정 불확실성
- sources of measurement uncertainty: 측정 불확실성의 원천
- assumptions, approximations and judgements: 가정, 근사치 및 판단
- forward-looking information: 미래 예측 정보

data_points.name_en: Identify metrics and amounts subject to high measurement uncertainty
data_points.description: (a) 측정 불확실성이 높은 것으로 공개한 정량적 지표 및 금전적 금액을 식별한다.

data_points.name_en: Disclosure in relation to each identified metric or amount
data_points.description: (b) 각 정량적 지표와 금전적 금액에 관하여: (i) 측정 불확실성의 원천에 대한 정보를 공개하고; (ii) 해당 금액을 측정하기 위해 기업이 한 가정, 근사치 및 판단에 대한 정보를 공개한다.

data_points.name_en: Sources of measurement uncertainty
data_points.description: (b)(i) 측정 불확실성의 원천(예: 미래 사건의 결과, 측정 기술 또는 상류 및/또는 하류 가치 사슬의 데이터 가용성 및 품질에 대한 의존도)에 대한 정보를 공개합니다.

data_points.name_en: Assumptions, approximations and judgements
data_points.description: (b)(ii) 해당 기업이 측정 과정에서 사용한 가정, 근사치 및 판단을 공개합니다.

data_points.name_en: Indication that forward-looking information is uncertain (optional)
data_points.description: 12항: 기업은 미래 예측 정보를 공개할 때 해당 정보가 불확실하다고 판단할 수 있다.

data_points.name_en: Changes in preparation or presentation of sustainability information
data_points.description: 13절: 지속가능성 정보의 준비 및 제시 방법이 이전 보고 기간과 비교하여 변경된 경우(ESRS 1의 7.4절 참조), 기업은 다음을 수행하여야 한다: (a) 변경 사항과 그 이유를 설명하여야 하며, 대체된 지표가 더 유용한 정보를 제공하는 이유를 포함하여야 한다; (b) 비교 가능한 수정된 수치를 공개하여야 한다. 수정이 불가능한 경우, 그 사실을 공개하여야 한다; 그리고 (c) 이전 기간에 공개된 수치와 수정된 비교 수치 간의 차이를 공개하여야 한다.

data_points.name_en: Explain the changes and the reasons
data_points.description: (a) 변경 사항과 그 이유를 설명하되, 대체된 지표가 더 유용한 정보를 제공하는 이유를 포함하여 설명합니다.

data_points.name_en: Disclose revised comparative figures
data_points.description: (b) 비교 대상 수치를 수정하여 공개하되, 불가능할 경우에는 그러하지 아니하다. 비교 정보를 1개 이상의 이전 기간에 대해 조정하는 것이 불가능할 경우, 기업은 그 사실을 공개하여야 한다.

data_points.name_ko: 전기 공시 수치와 수정 비교 수치의 차이
data_points.name_en: Disclose the difference between preceding and revised figure
data_points.description: (c) 직전 기간에 공개된 수치와 수정된 비교 수치를 비교한 차이를 공개합니다.

data_points.name_en: Reporting errors in prior periods
data_points.description: 14항: 기업이 이전 기간의 중요 오류(ESRS 1 제7.5절 참조)를 식별할 경우, 다음을 공개하여야 한다: (a) 이전 기간 중요 오류의 성질; (b) 지속가능성 보고서에 포함된 각 이전 기간에 대한 수정을 가능한 한 공개하며; (c) 오류를 수정하는 것이 불가능한 경우, 해당 상태가 존재하게 된 상황을 설명하여야 한다.

data_points.name_en: Nature of the prior period material error
data_points.description: (a) 전기 중요 오류의 성질

data_points.name_en: Correction for each prior period
data_points.description: (b) 가능한 경우, 지속가능성 보고서에 포함된 이전 기간의 각각에 대한 수정 사항.

data_points.name_en: Circumstances when correction is not practicable
data_points.description: (c) 오류를 수정하는 것이 불가능한 경우, 해당 상태가 존재하게 된 상황.

data_points.name_ko: 다른 법규 또는 일반적으로 인정된 보고 기준에 따른 공시
data_points.name_en: Disclosures stemming from other legislation or generally accepted sustainability reporting pronouncements
data_points.description: 제15조: 기업이 지속가능성 보고서에 다른 법률에서 요구하는 지속가능성 공개 또는 일반적으로 승인된 지속가능성 보고서 표준 및 프레임워크(ESRS 1 제8.2조 참조)에서 유래하는 정보를 포함하는 경우, 이러한 사실을 공개하여야 한다. 다른 보고서 표준 또는 프레임워크의 부분적 적용의 경우, 기업은 적용된 표준 또는 프레임워크의 조항에 대한 정확한 참조를 제공하여야 한다.

data_points.name_en: Incorporation by reference
data_points.description: 16항: 기업이 참조에 의한 방법으로 정보를 포함할 때(ESRS 1의 9.1절 참조에 의한 포함), 기업은 ESRS의 공개 요구 사항 목록 또는 공개 요구 사항에 의해 명령된 특정 데이터 포인트 중 참조에 의한 방법으로 포함된 것을 공개하여야 한다.

data_points.name_ko: ESRS 1 부록 C에 따른 단계적 적용
data_points.name_en: Use of phase-in provisions in accordance with Appendix C of ESRS 1
data_points.description: 제17조: 재무년도 평균 직원 수가 750명 이하인 기업 또는 그룹(결산일 현재)이 ESRS 1의 부록 C에 따라 ESRS E4, S1, S2, S3 또는 S4에서 요구하는 정보를 생략하기로 결정한 경우, 해당 기업은 여전히 ESRS E4, S1, S2, S3 및 S4에서 다루는 지속가능성 주제가 중요한 것으로 평가되었는지 여부를 공개하여야 한다. 이러한 주제 중 하나 이상이 중요한 것으로 평가된 경우, 해당 기업은 각 중요한 주제에 대해 다음을 수행하여야 한다: (a) 중요한 문제 목록(ESRS 1 부록 A의 AR 16)을 공개하고 비즈니스 모델 및 전략이 영향에 어떻게 고려하는지 간략히 설명한다; (b) 시간제한이 있는 목표, 진행 상황 및 생물다양성/생태계 목표가 확정된 과학적 증거에 기반하는지 여부를 간략히 설명한다; (c) 정책을 간략히 설명한다; (d) 실제 또는 잠재적인 부정적인 영향의 식별, 모니터링, 예방, 완화, 복구 또는 종료를 위한 조치와 그 결과를 간략히 설명한다; (e) 해당 문제와 관련된 지표를 공개한다.

data_points.name_ko: 중요 사항 목록 및 사업모델·전략에서의 반영
data_points.name_en: List of material matters and how business model and strategy take account of impacts
data_points.description: (a) AR 16 ESRS 1의 附錄 A에 나열된 사항(주제, 하위 주제 또는 하위 하위 주제) 중 중요한 것으로 평가된 사항의 목록을 공개하고, 해당 사항과 관련된 영향에 대하여 기업의 비즈니스 모델과 전략이 어떻게 고려하고 있는지 간략하게 설명하라.

data_points.name_en: Time-bound targets, progress, and biodiversity targets based on scientific evidence
data_points.description: (b) 해당 문제와 관련된 시간 제한 목표를 간략하게 설명하고, 이러한 목표를 달성하기 위한 진행 상황, 그리고 생물多樣性와 생태계 관련 목표가 확실히 과학적 증거에 기반하고 있는지 여부를 설명합니다.

data_points.name_en: Policies in relation to the matters in question
data_points.description: (c) 해당 문제와 관련된 정책을 간략하게 설명합니다.

data_points.name_en: Actions to identify, monitor, prevent, mitigate, remediate or bring an end to adverse impacts
data_points.description: (d) 해당 문제와 관련된 실제 또는 잠재적인 부정적인 영향에 대한 식별, 모니터링, 예방, 완화, 복구 또는 종결을 위한 조치를 간략하게 설명하고, 이러한 조치의 결과를 설명합니다.

data_points.name_en: Metrics relevant to the matters in question
data_points.description: (e) 관련 문제와 관련된 지표를 공개합니다.

data_points.name_ko: 유럽 표준 의존·외부 검증 및 표준 적합성(AR 2)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 2 – European standards and external assurance
data_points.description: AR 2: 기업은 유럽 표준화 시스템(ISO/IEC 또는 CEN/CENELEC 표준)에 따라 승인된 유럽 표준을 따르는지 여부를 공개할 수 있으며, 지속가능성 보고서 작성 목적으로 사용되는 데이터 및 프로세스가 외부 보증 제공자가 검증되어 해당 ISO/IEC 또는 CEN/CENELEC 표준에 준수하는 범위를 공개할 수 있다.

data_points.name_en: The role of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies
data_points.description: 18항: 본 장의 목적은 지속가능성 문제를 모니터링, 관리 및 감독하기 위한 거버넌스 프로세스, 통제 및 절차를 이해할 수 있도록 공개 요구 사항을 설정하는 것입니다. 19항: 기업은 행정, 경영, 감시 기관의 구성, 역할 및 책임, 지속가능성 문제에 관한 전문 지식 및 기술에 대한 접근을 공개하여야 합니다. 20항(목적): (a) 기관의 구성 및 다양성; (b) 재무 및 비재무 정보를 포함한 주요 영향, 위험 및 기회의 관리 프로세스에 대한 감독을 수행하는 역할 및 책임, 포함하여 경영진의 역할; (c) 지속가능성 문제에 관한 전문 지식 및 기술, 또는 이러한 전문 지식 및 기술에 대한 접근.

data_points.name_en: Composition and diversity of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies
data_points.description: Para 21: 기업은 다음 정보를 포함하여 경영, 관리 및 감시 기구 구성원의 구성 및 다양성에 관한 정보를 공개하여야 한다: (a) 임원 및 비임원 구성원의 수; (b) 종업원 및 기타 근로자의 대표성; (c) 기업의 부문, 제품 및 지리적 위치와 관련된 경력; (d) 성별 및 기타 다양성 측면(이사회 성별 다양성은 여성과 남성 이사 간의 평균 비율)으로 표시한百分율; 및 (e) 독립 이사 구성원의 퍼센트(단일 이사회: 독립 비임원 이사; 이중 이사회: 감시 기구의 독립 구성원).

data_points.name_en: Number of executive and non-executive members
data_points.description: (a) the number of executive and non-executive members.

data_points.name_en: Representation of employees and other workers
data_points.description: (b) 직원 및 기타 근로자의 대표성.

data_points.name_en: Experience relevant to sectors, products and geographic locations
data_points.description: (c) 기업의 산업 분야, 제품 및 지리적 위치와 관련된 경험

data_points.name_en: Percentage by gender and other aspects of diversity
data_points.description: (d) 성별 및 기업이 고려하는 다른 다양성 측면에 따른 백분율. 이사회 성별 다양성은 여성 이사와 남성 이사 간의 평균 비율로 계산된다.

data_points.name_en: Percentage of independent board members
data_points.description: (e) 이사회의 독립 이사 비율입니다. 단일 이사회를 갖춘 기업의 경우, 이는 비집행 이사 중 독립 이사의 비율에 해당합니다. 이중 이사회를 갖춘 기업의 경우, 이는 감시 기구의 독립 이사 비율에 해당합니다.

data_points.name_en: Roles and responsibilities of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies
data_points.description: Para 22: 기업은 역할과 책임에 관한 다음 정보를 공개하여야 한다: (a) 영향, 위험 및 기회에 대한 감시를 담당하는 기관 또는 개인의 신원; (b) 의사록, 이사회 위임 및 기타 관련 정책에서 어떻게 책임이 반영되는지; (c) 경영진의 역할에 대한 설명을 포함하여 (i) 특정 직위 또는 위원회에 위임되는지 여부 및 어떻게 감시가 이루어지는지, (ii) 기관에 대한 보고 라인, (iii) 전용 통제 및 절차와 다른 내부 기능과의 통합; (d) 기관과 고위 경영진이 중요한 환경, 사회 및 지배구조 관련 요인(IROs)에 관련된 목표 설정을 어떻게 감독하고, 그 목표를 향한 진행 상황을 어떻게 모니터링하는지.

data_points.name_ko: 영향·리스크·기회 감독 담당 기관 또는 개인 식별
data_points.name_en: Identity of bodies or individual(s) responsible for oversight of IROs
data_points.description: (a) 영향, 위험 및 기회의 감독을 담당하는 행정, 경영, 감시 기관(예: 이사회 위원회 또는 유사한 기관) 또는 기관 내의 개인의 身分.

data_points.name_ko: 역할이 정관·이사회 권한 등에 반영된 방식
data_points.name_en: How responsibilities are reflected in terms of reference, board mandates and policies
data_points.description: (b) 각 기관이나 개인의 영향, 위험 및 기회에 대한 책임이 기업의 업무 범위, 이사회 임무 및 기타 관련 정책에 어떻게 반영되는지.

data_points.name_en: Description of management's role in governance processes

data_points.name_ko: 특정 직위·위원회 위임 여부 및 감독 방식
data_points.name_en: Whether role is delegated to specific position or committee and how oversight is exercised
data_points.description: (c)(i) 해당 역할이 특정 관리 수준의 직위 또는 위원회에 위임되는지 여부 및 해당 직위 또는 위원회에 대한 감독이 어떻게 행사되는지

data_points.name_en: Reporting lines to the administrative, management and supervisory bodies
data_points.description: (c)(ii) 행정, 경영, 감시 기관에 대한 보고 라인에 관한 정보

data_points.name_ko: 전담 통제·절차 및 타 내부 기능과의 통합
data_points.name_en: Dedicated controls and procedures and integration with other internal functions
data_points.description: (c)(iii) 영향, 위험 및 기회 관리에 전용 통제 및 절차가 적용되는지 여부 및 적용되는 경우 다른 내부 기능과 어떻게 통합되는지

data_points.name_ko: 목표 설정 감독 및 이행 현황 모니터링
data_points.name_en: How bodies and senior management oversee target-setting and monitor progress
data_points.description: (d) 경영기구, 관리기구 및 감시기구와 고위 경영진이 중요한 영향, 위험 및 기회와 관련된 목표 설정을 어떻게 감독하며, 그 목표를 향한 진행 상황을 어떻게 모니터링하는지에 대한 설명.

data_points.name_en: Skills and expertise on sustainability matters
data_points.description: Para 23: 공개는 관리, 경영 및 감시 기관이 지속가능성 문제를 감독하기 위해 적절한 기술과 전문 지식이 이용 가능하거나 개발될 수 있는지 여부를 결정하는 방법에 대한 설명을 포함하여야 하며, 다음을 포함한다: (a) 기관이 전체적으로 직접적으로 보유하거나 활용할 수 있는(예: 전문가에 대한 접근 또는 교육을 통해) 지속가능성 관련 전문 지식; 및 (b) 이러한 기술과 전문 지식이 기업의 중요한 영향, 위험 및 기회와 어떻게 관련되는지.

data_points.name_en: Sustainability-related expertise that bodies possess or can leverage
data_points.description: (a) 해당 기구 전체가 직접 보유하거나, 예를 들어 전문가에 대한 접근이나 교육을 통해 활용할 수 있는 지속가능성 관련 전문 지식

data_points.name_en: How skills and expertise relate to material impacts, risks and opportunities
data_points.description: (b) 해당 기술 및 전문 지식이 기업의 중요한 영향, 위험 및 기회와 어떻게 관련되는지.

data_points.name_ko: 역할·책임 설명 시 명시 가능 사항(AR 3)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 3 – Aspects, form and organisation of oversight
data_points.description: AR 3: 지속가능성 관련 업무에 대한 행정, 경영, 감시 기관의 역할과 책임을 설명할 때, 기업은 다음을 명시할 수 있다: (a) 이러한 기관이 지속가능성의 어떤 측면에 대해 관리 감독을 수행하는지(즉, i. 전략 및 비즈니스 모델의 지속가능성 관련 측면에 대한 평가 및 변경; ii. 물질적인 위험, 기회 및 영향의 식별 및 평가; iii. 관련 정책 및 목표, 행동 계획 및 지정된 자원; iv. 지속가능성 보고서); (b) 이러한 관리 감독의 형태: 정보 제공, 협의 또는 의사 결정; (c) 이러한 관리 감독이 어떻게 조직되고 공식화되는지, 즉 이러한 지속가능성 측면과 관련하여 기관이 어떻게 참여하는지에 대한 절차.

data_points.name_en: Aspects of sustainability over which oversight is exercised
data_points.description: AR 3(a): 지속가능성에 대한 감독의 대상이 되는 영역: (i) 지속가능성 관련 전략 및 비즈니스 모델의 평가 및 변경; (ii) 물적 위험, 기회 및 영향의 식별 및 평가; (iii) 관련 정책 및 목표, 행동 계획 및 지정된 자원; (iv) 지속가능성 보고서.

data_points.name_en: Form such oversight takes
data_points.description: AR 3(b): the form such oversight takes for each of the above aspects: i.e., information, consultation or decision-making.

data_points.name_en: Way oversight is organised and formalised
data_points.description: AR 3(c): the way such oversight is organised and formalised, i.e., processes by which the administrative, management and supervisory bodies engage with these aspects of sustainability.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 4 – Diagram to complement governance description
data_points.description: AR 4: In describing the undertaking's organisation of governance regarding sustainability matters, a description of complex governance structure may be complemented by their presentation in the form of a diagram.

data_points.name_ko: 전문성 설명의 구체화·물질적 IRO 연관·기타 전문성 원천(AR 5)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 5 – Expertise substantiated, relevance and access
data_points.description: AR 5: The description of the level of expertise or access to expertise of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies may be substantiated by illustrating the composition of the bodies, including members on whom these bodies rely for expertise to oversee sustainability matters, and how they leverage that expertise as a body. In the description, the undertaking shall consider how the expertise and skills are relevant to the undertaking's material impacts, risks and opportunities and whether the bodies and/or its members have access to other sources of expertise, such as specific experts and training and other educational initiatives to update and develop sustainability-related expertise within these bodies.

data_points.name_ko: 기관에 제공된 정보 및 기관이 다룬 지속가능성 사항
data_points.name_en: Information provided to and sustainability matters addressed by the administrative, management and supervisory bodies
data_points.description: Para 24: The undertaking shall disclose how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies are informed about sustainability matters and how these matters were addressed during the reporting period. Para 25 (objective): to provide an understanding of how the bodies are informed about sustainability matters, what information and matters they addressed during the reporting period, and whether the members of these bodies were adequately informed and able to fulfil their roles.

data_points.name_en: Information to be disclosed (para 26)
data_points.description: Para 26: The undertaking shall disclose the following information: (a) whether, by whom and how frequently the administrative, management and supervisory bodies, including their relevant committees, are informed about material impacts, risks and opportunities (see IRO-1), the implementation of due diligence, and the results and effectiveness of policies, actions, metrics and targets adopted to address them; (b) how the bodies consider impacts, risks and opportunities when overseeing the undertaking's strategy, major transactions, and risk management process, including whether they have considered trade-offs; and (c) a list of the material impacts, risks and opportunities addressed by the bodies or their relevant committees during the reporting period.

data_points.name_en: Whether, by whom and how frequently the bodies are informed
data_points.description: (a) whether, by whom and how frequently the administrative, management and supervisory bodies, including their relevant committees, are informed about material impacts, risks and opportunities (see Disclosure Requirement IRO-1), the implementation of due diligence, and the results and effectiveness of policies, actions, metrics and targets adopted to address them.

data_points.name_ko: 전략·주요 거래·리스크 관리에서 IRO 고려 방식
data_points.name_en: How the bodies consider IROs when overseeing strategy, major transactions and risk management
data_points.description: (b) how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies consider impacts, risks and opportunities when overseeing the undertaking's strategy, its decisions on major transactions, and its risk management process, including whether they have considered trade-offs associated with those impacts, risks and opportunities.

data_points.name_ko: 보고 기간 중 기관이 다룬 중요 IRO 목록
data_points.name_en: List of material IROs addressed by the bodies during the reporting period
data_points.description: (c) a list of the material impacts, risks and opportunities addressed by the administrative, management and supervisory bodies, or their relevant committees during the reporting period.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 6 – Performance monitoring mechanism
data_points.description: AR 6: Depending on the undertaking's structure, the administrative, management and supervisory bodies may focus on overarching targets, while management focuses on the more detailed targets. In this case, the undertaking may disclose how the governance bodies ensure that an appropriate mechanism for performance monitoring is in place.

data_points.name_ko: 인센티브 제도에의 지속가능성 관련 성과 통합
data_points.name_en: Integration of sustainability-related performance in incentive schemes
data_points.description: Para 27: The undertaking shall disclose information about the integration of its sustainability-related performance in incentive schemes. Para 28 (objective): to provide an understanding of whether incentive schemes are offered to members of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies that are linked to sustainability matters.

data_points.name_en: Incentive schemes and remuneration policies linked to sustainability matters
data_points.description: Para 29: The undertaking shall disclose the following information about the incentive schemes and remuneration policies linked to sustainability matters for members of the undertaking's administrative, management and supervisory bodies, where they exist: (a) a description of the key characteristics of the incentive schemes; (b) whether performance is being assessed against specific sustainability-related targets and/or impacts, and if so, which ones; (c) whether and how sustainability-related performance metrics are considered as performance benchmarks or included in remuneration policies; (d) the proportion of variable remuneration dependent on sustainability-related targets and/or impacts; and (e) the level in the undertaking at which the terms of incentive schemes are approved and updated.

data_points.name_en: Key characteristics of the incentive schemes
data_points.description: (a) a description of the key characteristics of the incentive schemes.

data_points.name_ko: 지속가능성 관련 목표·영향에 대한 성과 평가 여부
data_points.name_en: Whether performance is assessed against sustainability-related targets and/or impacts
data_points.description: (b) whether performance is being assessed against specific sustainability-related targets and/or impacts, and if so, which ones.

data_points.name_ko: 지속가능성 성과 지표의 벤치마크·보수 정책 반영
data_points.name_en: Whether and how sustainability-related performance metrics are in benchmarks or remuneration
data_points.description: (c) whether and how sustainability-related performance metrics are considered as performance benchmarks or included in remuneration policies.

data_points.name_ko: 지속가능성 관련 목표·영향에 연동된 변동 보수 비율
data_points.name_en: Proportion of variable remuneration dependent on sustainability-related targets and/or impacts
data_points.description: (d) the proportion of variable remuneration dependent on sustainability-related targets and/or impacts.

data_points.name_en: Level at which the terms of incentive schemes are approved and updated
data_points.description: (e) the level in the undertaking at which the terms of incentive schemes are approved and updated.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 7 – Listed undertakings and remuneration report
data_points.description: AR 7: For listed undertakings, this Disclosure Requirement should be consistent with the remuneration report prescribed in articles 9a and 9b of Directive 2007/36/EC on the exercise of certain rights of shareholders in listed companies. Subject to the provisions of ESRS 1, paragraphs 119, 120 and 122, a listed undertaking may make a reference to its remuneration report.

data_points.name_en: Statement on due diligence
data_points.description: Para 30: The undertaking shall disclose a mapping of the information provided in its sustainability statement about the due diligence process. Para 31 (objective): to facilitate an understanding of the undertaking's due diligence process with regard to sustainability matters. Para 32: The main aspects and steps of due diligence referred to under ESRS 1 chapter 4 are related to cross-cutting and topical Disclosure Requirements. The undertaking shall provide a mapping that explains how and where its application of the main aspects and steps of the due diligence process are reflected in its sustainability statement, to allow a depiction of the actual practices of the undertaking with regard to due diligence. Para 33: This disclosure requirement does not mandate any specific behavioural requirements with regard to due diligence actions and does not extend or modify the role of administrative, management and supervisory bodies as mandated by other legislation or regulation.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 8 – Mapping in the form of a table
data_points.description: AR 8: The mapping required by paragraph 30 may be presented in the form of a table, cross-referencing the core elements of due diligence, for impacts on people and the environment, to the relevant disclosures in the undertaking's sustainability statement.

data_points.name_ko: 사람·환경에 대한 공시 구분을 위한 추가 열(AR 9)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 9 – Additional columns for impacts on people and/or environment
data_points.description: AR 9: The undertaking may include additional columns to the table below to clearly identify those disclosures that relate to impacts on people and/or the environment given that, in some cases, more than one disclosure may provide information about the same due diligence step.

data_points.name_ko: UNGP·OECD MNE 가이드라인과 실사 핵심 요소의 참조(AR 10)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 10 – UNGP and OECD MNE references in ESRS 1 chapter 4
data_points.description: AR 10: The main references in the international instruments of the UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights and the OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises to the core elements of the due diligence process are listed in ESRS 1 chapter 4.

data_points.name_ko: 실사 핵심 요소 (a) 거버넌스·전략·사업모델에의 실사 내재화
data_points.name_en: Core element (a) Embedding due diligence in governance, strategy and business model
data_points.description: CORE ELEMENTS OF DUE DILIGENCE (a) Embedding due diligence in governance, strategy and business model. To be cross-referenced to relevant paragraphs in the sustainability statement.

data_points.name_ko: 실사 핵심 요소 (b) 실사 주요 단계에서 영향받는 이해관계자와의 협의
data_points.name_en: Core element (b) Engaging with affected stakeholders in all key steps of the due diligence
data_points.description: CORE ELEMENTS OF DUE DILIGENCE (b) Engaging with affected stakeholders in all key steps of the due diligence. To be cross-referenced to relevant paragraphs in the sustainability statement.

data_points.name_ko: 실사 핵심 요소 (c) 부정적 영향의 식별·평가
data_points.name_en: Core element (c) Identifying and assessing adverse impacts
data_points.description: CORE ELEMENTS OF DUE DILIGENCE (c) Identifying and assessing adverse impacts. To be cross-referenced to relevant paragraphs in the sustainability statement.

data_points.name_ko: 실사 핵심 요소 (d) 부정적 영향 대응을 위한 조치
data_points.name_en: Core element (d) Taking actions to address those adverse impacts
data_points.description: CORE ELEMENTS OF DUE DILIGENCE (d) Taking actions to address those adverse impacts. To be cross-referenced to relevant paragraphs in the sustainability statement.

data_points.name_ko: 실사 핵심 요소 (e) 조치 효과 추적 및 공유
data_points.name_en: Core element (e) Tracking the effectiveness of these efforts and communicating
data_points.description: CORE ELEMENTS OF DUE DILIGENCE (e) Tracking the effectiveness of these efforts and communicating on these efforts. To be cross-referenced to relevant paragraphs in the sustainability statement.

data_points.name_ko: 지속가능성 보고 관련 리스크 관리 및 내부통제
data_points.name_en: Risk management and internal controls over sustainability reporting
data_points.description: Para 34: The undertaking shall disclose the main features of its risk management and internal control system in relation to the sustainability reporting process. Para 35 (objective): to provide an understanding of the undertaking's risk management and internal control processes in relation to sustainability reporting.

data_points.name_en: Information to be disclosed (para 36)
data_points.description: Para 36: The undertaking shall disclose the following information: (a) the scope, main features and components of the risk management and internal control processes and systems in relation to sustainability reporting; (b) the risk assessment approach followed, including the risk prioritisation methodology; (c) the main risks identified and their mitigation strategies including related controls; (d) a description of how the undertaking integrates the findings of its risk assessment and internal controls as regards the sustainability reporting process into relevant internal functions and processes; and (e) a description of the periodic reporting of the findings referred to in point (d) to the administrative, management and supervisory bodies.

data_points.name_en: Scope, main features and components of risk management and internal control
data_points.description: (a) the scope, main features and components of the risk management and internal control processes and systems in relation to sustainability reporting.

data_points.name_ko: 리스크 평가 접근법 및 우선순위화 방법론
data_points.name_en: Risk assessment approach and risk prioritisation methodology
data_points.description: (b) the risk assessment approach followed, including the risk prioritisation methodology.

data_points.name_ko: 주요 리스크 및 완화 전략·관련 통제
data_points.name_en: Main risks identified and their mitigation strategies including related controls
data_points.description: (c) the main risks identified and their mitigation strategies including related controls.

data_points.name_ko: 리스크 평가·내부통제 결과의 내부 기능·프로세스 통합
data_points.name_en: Integration of risk assessment and internal control findings into internal functions and processes
data_points.description: (d) a description of how the undertaking integrates the findings of its risk assessment and internal controls as regards the sustainability reporting process into relevant internal functions and processes.

data_points.name_en: Periodic reporting of findings to the administrative, management and supervisory bodies
data_points.description: (e) a description of the periodic reporting of the findings referred to in point (d) to the administrative, management and supervisory bodies.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 11 – Internal control over sustainability reporting and risks to consider
data_points.description: AR 11: This Disclosure Requirement focuses solely on the internal control processes over the sustainability reporting process. The undertaking may consider risks such as the completeness and integrity of the data, the accuracy of estimation results, the availability of upstream and/or downstream value chain data, and the timing of the availability of the information.

data_points.name_en: Strategy, business model and value chain
data_points.description: Para 37: This chapter sets disclosure requirements that enable an understanding of: (a) the elements of the undertaking's strategy that relate to or affect sustainability matters, its business model and its value chain; (b) how the interests and views of stakeholders are taken into account by the strategy and business model; and (c) the outcome of the undertaking's assessment of material impacts, risks and opportunities, including how they inform its strategy and business model. Para 38-39: The undertaking shall disclose the elements of its strategy that relate to or impact sustainability matters, its business model and its value chain; objective is to describe key elements of general strategy and business model and value chain.

data_points.name_en: Key elements of general strategy that relate to or affect sustainability matters
data_points.description: Para 40: The undertaking shall disclose information about the key elements of its general strategy that relate to or affect sustainability matters: (a) description of significant products/services, markets/customer groups, headcount by geography, and where material products banned in certain markets; (b) breakdown of total revenue by significant ESRS sectors (reconciled with IFRS 8 where applicable); (c) list of additional significant ESRS sectors; (d) where applicable, statement on fossil fuel, chemicals, controversial weapons, tobacco with related revenues; (e) sustainability-related goals; (f) assessment of current products/services and markets in relation to those goals; (g) elements of strategy relating to sustainability, including main challenges and critical solutions or projects.

data_points.name_en: Description of products, services, markets, customer groups, headcount
data_points.description: (a) a description of: (i) significant groups of products and/or services offered, including changes in the reporting period; (ii) significant markets and/or customer groups served, including changes; (iii) headcount of employees by geographical areas; and (iv) where applicable and material, products and services that are banned in certain markets.

data_points.name_ko: 주요 제품·서비스군 및 보고 기간 변경
data_points.name_en: Significant groups of products and/or services, including changes
data_points.description: (a)(i) significant groups of products and/or services offered, including changes in the reporting period (new/removed products and/or services).

data_points.name_ko: 주요 시장·고객군 및 보고 기간 변경
data_points.name_en: Significant markets and/or customer groups, including changes
data_points.description: (a)(ii) significant markets and/or customer groups served, including changes in the reporting period (new/removed markets and/or customer groups).

data_points.name_en: Headcount of employees by geographical areas
data_points.description: (a)(iii) headcount of employees by geographical areas.

data_points.name_en: Products and services banned in certain markets (where applicable and material)
data_points.description: (a)(iv) where applicable and material, products and services that are banned in certain markets.

data_points.name_en: Breakdown of total revenue by significant ESRS sectors
data_points.description: (b) a breakdown of total revenue, as included in its financial statements, by significant ESRS sectors. When the undertaking provides segment reporting as required by IFRS 8 in its financial statements, this sector revenue information shall, as far as possible, be reconciled with IFRS 8 information.

data_points.name_ko: 40(b) 외 추가 중요 ESRS 섹터 목록
data_points.name_en: List of additional significant ESRS sectors
data_points.description: (c) a list of the additional significant ESRS sectors beyond the ones reflected under paragraph 40(b), such as activities that give rise to intercompany revenues, in which the undertaking develops significant activities, or in which it is or may be connected to material impacts. The identification shall be consistent with the materiality assessment and sector-specific disclosure.

data_points.name_en: Statement on fossil fuel, chemicals, controversial weapons, tobacco (where applicable)
data_points.description: (d) where applicable, a statement indicating, together with the related revenues, that the undertaking is active in: (i) the fossil fuel sector (with coal/oil/gas disaggregation and Taxonomy-aligned fossil gas); (ii) chemicals production (Division 20.2); (iii) controversial weapons (anti-personnel mines, cluster munitions, chemical and biological weapons); and/or (iv) the cultivation and production of tobacco.

data_points.name_en: Fossil fuel (coal, oil and gas) sector
data_points.description: (d)(i) the fossil fuel sector (exploration, mining, extraction, production, processing, storage, refining or distribution of fossil fuels per Regulation (EU) 2018/1999), including disaggregation of revenues from coal, oil and gas, and Taxonomy-aligned economic activities related to fossil gas per Article 8(7)(a) of Delegated Regulation 2021/2178.

data_points.name_en: Chemicals production
data_points.description: (d)(ii) chemicals production, i.e., activities fall under Division 20.2 of Annex I to Regulation (EC) No 1893/2006.

data_points.name_en: Controversial weapons
data_points.description: (d)(iii) controversial weapons (anti-personnel mines, cluster munitions, chemical weapons and biological weapons).

data_points.name_en: Cultivation and production of tobacco
data_points.description: (d)(iv) the cultivation and production of tobacco.

data_points.name_en: Sustainability-related goals
data_points.description: (e) its sustainability-related goals in terms of significant groups of products and services, customer categories, geographical areas and relationships with stakeholders.

data_points.name_ko: 현재 제품·서비스·시장과 지속가능성 목표의 관계 평가
data_points.name_en: Assessment of current products, services and markets in relation to sustainability goals
data_points.description: (f) an assessment of its current significant products and/or services, and significant markets and customer groups, in relation to its sustainability-related goals.

data_points.name_en: Elements of strategy that relate to or impact sustainability matters
data_points.description: (g) the elements of the undertaking's strategy that relate to or impact sustainability matters, including the main challenges ahead, critical solutions or projects to be put in place, when relevant for sustainability reporting.

data_points.name_en: Exemption from revenue breakdown by ESRS sector (where applicable)
data_points.description: Para 41: If the undertaking is based in an EU Member State that allows for an exemption from the disclosure referred to in Article 18(1)(a) of Directive 2013/34/EU, and if the undertaking has made use of that exemption, it may omit the breakdown of revenue by significant ESRS sector required by paragraph 40(b). In this case the undertaking shall nevertheless disclose the list of ESRS sectors that are significant for the undertaking.

data_points.name_en: Description of business model and value chain
data_points.description: Para 42: The undertaking shall disclose a description of its business model and value chain, including: (a) its inputs and its approach to gathering, developing and securing those inputs; (b) its outputs and outcomes in terms of current and expected benefits for customers, investors and other stakeholders; and (c) the main features of its upstream and downstream value chain and the undertaking's position in its value chain, including main business actors (key suppliers, customers, distribution channels, end-users) and their relationship to the undertaking. When the undertaking has multiple value chains, the disclosure shall cover the key value chains.

data_points.name_en: Inputs and approach to gathering, developing and securing inputs
data_points.description: (a) its inputs and its approach to gathering, developing and securing those inputs.

data_points.name_en: Outputs and outcomes for customers, investors and other stakeholders
data_points.description: (b) its outputs and outcomes in terms of current and expected benefits for customers, investors and other stakeholders.

data_points.name_ko: 상·하류 가치사슬 주요 특징 및 기업의 위치
data_points.name_en: Main features of value chain and undertaking's position
data_points.description: (c) the main features of its upstream and downstream value chain and the undertaking's position in its value chain, including a description of the main business actors (such as key suppliers, customers, distribution channels and end-users) and their relationship to the undertaking. When the undertaking has multiple value chains, the disclosure shall cover the key value chains.

data_points.name_ko: para 40 섹터 정보·ESRS 섹터에 따른 중요 활동 매핑(AR 12)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 12 – Map significant activities in accordance with ESRS sectors
data_points.description: AR 12: To provide the information on sectors required by paragraph 40, the undertaking shall map its significant activities in accordance with ESRS sectors. If a code for a sub-sector does not exist, the caption "others" shall be used.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 13 – Significance criteria for paragraph 40
data_points.description: AR 13: For the purposes of the disclosures required in paragraph 40, a group of products and/or services offered, a group of markets and/or customer groups served, or an ESRS sector, is significant for the undertaking if it meets one or both of the following criteria: (a) it accounts for more than 10 per cent of the undertaking's revenue; (b) it is connected with material actual impacts or material potential negative impacts of the undertaking.

data_points.name_en: Accounts for more than 10% of revenue
data_points.description: AR 13(a): it accounts for more than 10 per cent of the undertaking's revenue.

data_points.name_en: Connected with material actual or potential negative impacts
data_points.description: AR 13(b): it is connected with material actual impacts or material potential negative impacts of the undertaking.

data_points.name_ko: 사업모델·가치사슬 공시 준비 시 고려 사항(AR 14)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 14 – Considerations for business model and value chain disclosures
data_points.description: AR 14: In preparing disclosures relating to its business model and value chain, the undertaking shall consider: (a) its key activities, resources, distribution channels and customer segments; (b) its key business relationships and their key characteristics, including relationships with customers and suppliers; (c) the cost structure and revenue of its business segments, in line with IFRS 8 disclosure requirements in the financial statement, where applicable; (d) the potential impacts, risks and opportunities in its significant sector(s) and their possible relationship to its own business model or value chain.

data_points.name_en: Key activities, resources, distribution channels and customer segments
data_points.description: AR 14(a): its key activities, resources, distribution channels and customer segments.

data_points.name_en: Key business relationships and characteristics
data_points.description: AR 14(b): its key business relationships and their key characteristics, including relationships with customers and suppliers.

data_points.name_ko: 사업 세그먼트의 비용 구조·매출(IFRS 8 적용 시)
data_points.name_en: Cost structure and revenue of business segments, IFRS 8 where applicable
data_points.description: AR 14(c): the cost structure and revenue of its business segments, in line with IFRS 8 disclosure requirements in the financial statement, where applicable.

data_points.name_ko: 중요 섹터의 잠재적 IRO 및 사업모델·가치사슬과의 관계
data_points.name_en: Potential IRO in significant sector(s) and relationship to business model or value chain
data_points.description: AR 14(d): the potential impacts, risks and opportunities in its significant sector(s) and their possible relationship to its own business model or value chain.

data_points.name_ko: 상·하류 가치사슬 맥락 정보·ESRS 1 ch 5·물질성 평가(AR 15)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 15 – Contextual information on value chain and ESRS 1 ch 5 and 3
data_points.description: AR 15: Contextual information may be particularly relevant for users to understand to what extent the disclosures include upstream and/or downstream value chain information. The description of the main features of the upstream and/or downstream value chain and where applicable the identification of key value chains should support an understanding of how the undertaking applies the requirements of ESRS 1 chapter 5 and the materiality assessment performed in line with ESRS 1 chapter 3. The description may provide a high-level overview of the key features of upstream and/or downstream value chain entities indicating their relative contribution to the undertaking's performance and position and explaining how they contribute to the value creation of the undertaking.

data_points.name_en: Interests and views of stakeholders
data_points.description: Para 43: The undertaking shall disclose how the interests and views of its stakeholders are taken into account by the undertaking's strategy and business model. Para 44 (objective): to provide an understanding of how stakeholders' interests and views inform the undertaking's strategy and business model.

data_points.name_en: Information to be disclosed (para 45)
data_points.description: Para 45: The undertaking shall disclose a summarised description of: (a) its stakeholder engagement (key stakeholders, whether engagement occurs and for which categories, how it is organised, its purpose, how outcome is taken into account); (b) its understanding of the interests and views of key stakeholders as they relate to strategy and business model (to the extent analysed in due diligence and/or materiality assessment, see IRO-1); (c) where applicable, amendments to strategy and/or business model; (d) whether and how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies are informed about the views and interests of affected stakeholders regarding sustainability-related impacts.

data_points.name_en: Stakeholder engagement
data_points.description: (a) its stakeholder engagement, including: (i) the undertaking's key stakeholders; (ii) whether engagement with them occurs and for which categories of stakeholders; (iii) how it is organised; (iv) its purpose; and (v) how its outcome is taken into account by the undertaking.

data_points.name_en: Key stakeholders
data_points.description: (a)(i) the undertaking's key stakeholders.

data_points.name_en: Whether engagement occurs and for which categories of stakeholders
data_points.description: (a)(ii) whether engagement with them occurs and for which categories of stakeholders.

data_points.name_en: How stakeholder engagement is organised
data_points.description: (a)(iii) how it is organised.

data_points.name_en: Purpose of stakeholder engagement
data_points.description: (a)(iv) its purpose.

data_points.name_en: How the outcome of engagement is taken into account
data_points.description: (a)(v) how its outcome is taken into account by the undertaking.

data_points.name_en: Understanding of the interests and views of key stakeholders
data_points.description: (b) the undertaking's understanding of the interests and views of its key stakeholders as they relate to the undertaking's strategy and business model, to the extent that these were analysed during the undertaking's due diligence process and/or materiality assessment process (see Disclosure Requirement IRO-1 of this Standard).

data_points.name_en: Amendments to strategy and/or business model (where applicable)
data_points.description: (c) where applicable, amendments to its strategy and/or business model, including: (i) how the undertaking has amended or expects to amend its strategy and/or business model to address the interests and views of its stakeholders; (ii) any further steps that are being planned and in what timeline; and (iii) whether these steps are likely to modify the relationship with and views of stakeholders.

data_points.name_en: How the undertaking has amended or expects to amend strategy and/or business model
data_points.description: (c)(i) how the undertaking has amended or expects to amend its strategy and/or business model to address the interests and views of its stakeholders.

data_points.name_en: Further steps planned and timeline
data_points.description: (c)(ii) any further steps that are being planned and in what timeline.

data_points.name_en: Whether steps are likely to modify relationship with and views of stakeholders
data_points.description: (c)(iii) whether these steps are likely to modify the relationship with and views of stakeholders.

data_points.name_en: Whether and how the bodies are informed about views and interests of affected stakeholders
data_points.description: (d) whether and how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies are informed about the views and interests of affected stakeholders with regard to the undertaking's sustainability-related impacts.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 16 – Stakeholder views and interests relevant to strategy or business model
data_points.description: AR 16: The views and interests of stakeholders that are expressed as part of the undertaking's engagement with stakeholders through its due diligence process may be relevant to one or more aspects of its strategy or business model. As such, they may affect the undertaking's decisions regarding the future direction of the strategy or business model.

data_points.name_en: Material impacts, risks and opportunities and their interaction with strategy and business model
data_points.description: Para 46: The undertaking shall disclose its material impacts, risks and opportunities and how they interact with its strategy and business model. Para 47 (objective): to provide an understanding of the material IRO as they result from the undertaking's materiality assessment and how they originate from and trigger adaptation of the undertaking's strategy and business model including its resources allocation. Information on management of material IRO is prescribed in topical ESRS and sector-specific standards, in conjunction with Minimum Disclosure Requirements on policies, actions and targets in this Standard.

data_points.name_en: Information to be disclosed (para 48)
data_points.description: Para 48: The undertaking shall disclose (a) brief description of material IRO from materiality assessment and where they are concentrated in business model, operations and value chain; (b) current and anticipated effects on business model, value chain, strategy, decision-making and response; (c) with reference to material impacts: (i)-(iv); (d) current financial effects; (e) anticipated financial effects short/medium/long-term and (e)(i)(ii); (f) resilience of strategy and business model; (g) changes to material IRO vs previous period; (h) specification of IRO covered by ESRS vs entity-specific disclosures.

data_points.name_ko: 물질적 IRO에 대한 간략 설명 및 집중 위치
data_points.name_en: Brief description of material IRO and where they are concentrated
data_points.description: (a) a brief description of its material impacts, risks and opportunities resulting from its materiality assessment (see IRO-1), including a description of where in its business model, its own operations and its upstream and downstream value chain these material impacts, risks and opportunities are concentrated.

data_points.name_ko: 물질적 IRO의 효과 및 전략·사업모델에 대한 대응
data_points.name_en: Current and anticipated effects and response on business model, strategy and decision-making
data_points.description: (b) the current and anticipated effects of its material impacts, risks and opportunities on its business model, value chain, strategy and decision-making, and how it has responded or plans to respond to these effects, including any changes it has made or plans to make to its strategy or business model as part of its actions to address particular material impacts or risks, or to pursue particular material opportunities.

data_points.name_en: Material impacts: effects on people/environment, connection to strategy, time horizons, involvement
data_points.description: (c) with reference to the undertaking's material impacts: (i) how material negative and positive impacts affect (or are likely to affect) people or the environment; (ii) whether and how the impacts originate from or are connected to the undertaking's strategy and business model; (iii) the reasonably expected time horizons of the impacts; (iv) whether the undertaking is involved through its activities or business relationships and the nature of those.

data_points.name_ko: 물질적 영향이 사람·환경에 미치는(또는 미칠) 영향
data_points.name_en: How material impacts affect or are likely to affect people or the environment
data_points.description: (c)(i) how the undertaking's material negative and positive impacts affect (or, in the case of potential impacts, are likely to affect) people or the environment.

data_points.name_en: Whether and how impacts originate from or are connected to strategy and business model
data_points.description: (c)(ii) whether and how the impacts originate from or are connected to the undertaking's strategy and business model.

data_points.name_en: Reasonably expected time horizons of the impacts
data_points.description: (c)(iii) the reasonably expected time horizons of the impacts.

data_points.name_ko: 활동 또는 사업적 관계를 통한 물질적 영향 관여
data_points.name_en: Whether involved with material impacts through activities or business relationships
data_points.description: (c)(iv) whether the undertaking is involved with the material impacts through its activities or because of its business relationships, describing the nature of the activities or business relationships concerned.

data_points.name_en: Current financial effects of material risks and opportunities
data_points.description: (d) the current financial effects of the undertaking's material risks and opportunities on its financial position, financial performance and cash flows and the material risks and opportunities for which there is a significant risk of a material adjustment within the next annual reporting period to the carrying amounts of assets and liabilities reported in the related financial statements.

data_points.name_en: Anticipated financial effects over short-, medium- and long-term
data_points.description: (e) the anticipated financial effects of the undertaking's material risks and opportunities on its financial position, financial performance and cash flows over the short-, medium- and long-term, including reasonably expected time horizons; how the undertaking expects its financial position, performance and cash flows to change given its strategy to manage risks and opportunities, taking into consideration (i) investment and disposal plans and (ii) planned sources of funding.

data_points.name_en: Investment and disposal plans
data_points.description: (e)(i) its investment and disposal plans (e.g. capital expenditure, major acquisitions and divestments, joint ventures, business transformation, innovation, new business areas and asset retirements), including plans the undertaking is not contractually committed to.

data_points.name_ko: 전략 이행을 위한 계획된 자금 조달 원천
data_points.name_en: Planned sources of funding to implement strategy
data_points.description: (e)(ii) its planned sources of funding to implement its strategy.

data_points.name_en: Resilience of strategy and business model
data_points.description: (f) information about the resilience of the undertaking's strategy and business model regarding its capacity to address its material impacts and risks and to take advantage of its material opportunities. The undertaking shall disclose a qualitative and, when applicable, a quantitative analysis of the resilience, including how the analysis was conducted and the time horizons applied (ESRS 1 chapter 6). When providing quantitative information, the undertaking may disclose single amounts or ranges.

data_points.name_ko: 이전 보고 기간 대비 물질적 IRO 변경
data_points.name_en: Changes to material IRO compared to previous reporting period
data_points.description: (g) changes to the material impacts, risks and opportunities compared to the previous reporting period.

data_points.name_ko: ESRS 공시 요건 대비 추가 기업별 공시 구분
data_points.name_en: Specification of IRO covered by ESRS vs entity-specific disclosures
data_points.description: (h) a specification of those impacts, risks and opportunities that are covered by ESRS Disclosure Requirements as opposed to those covered by the undertaking using additional entity-specific disclosures.

data_points.name_en: Descriptive information alongside topical ESRS (optional)
data_points.description: Para 49: The undertaking may disclose the descriptive information required in paragraph 46 alongside the disclosures provided under the corresponding topical ESRS, in which case it shall still present a statement of its material impacts, risks and opportunities alongside its disclosures prepared under this chapter of ESRS 2.

data_points.name_ko: 가치사슬 내 물질적 IRO 집중 위치 고려(AR 17)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 17 – Where in value chain material IRO are concentrated
data_points.description: AR 17: When describing where in its upstream and/or downstream value chain material impacts, risks and opportunities are concentrated, the undertaking shall consider: geographical areas, facilities or types of assets, inputs, outputs and distribution channels.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 18 – Disclosure in terms of single or aggregated IRO
data_points.description: AR 18: This disclosure may be expressed in terms of a single impact, risk or opportunity or by aggregating groups of material impacts, risks and opportunities, when this provides more relevant information and does not obscure material information.

data_points.name_ko: 물질성 평가 프로세스에 대한 공시(4.1 장 목적)
data_points.name_en: Disclosures on the materiality assessment process (chapter 4.1 objective)
data_points.description: Para 50: This chapter sets disclosure requirements that enable an understanding of: (a) the process to identify material impacts, risks and opportunities; and (b) the information that, as a result of its materiality assessment, the undertaking has included in its sustainability statement.

data_points.name_en: Description of the process to identify and assess material impacts, risks and opportunities
data_points.description: Para 51: The undertaking shall disclose its process to identify its impacts, risks and opportunities and to assess which ones are material. Para 52 (objective): to provide an understanding of the process through which the undertaking identifies IRO and assesses their materiality, as the basis for determining the disclosures in its sustainability statement (see ESRS 1 chapter 3 and related Application Requirements, double materiality).

data_points.name_en: Information to be disclosed (para 53)
data_points.description: Para 53: The undertaking shall disclose (a) description of methodologies and assumptions; (b) overview of process to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor potential and actual impacts on people and the environment (impact materiality), including (i)-(iv); (c) overview of process to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor risks and opportunities with financial effects, including (i)-(iii); (d) decision-making process and internal control procedures; (e) integration of impacts/risks process into overall risk management; (f) integration of opportunities process into overall management where applicable; (g) input parameters; (h) whether and how the process has changed vs prior period, when last modified and future revision dates.

data_points.name_en: Methodologies and assumptions applied in the process
data_points.description: (a) a description of the methodologies and assumptions applied in the described process.

data_points.name_en: Process to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor impacts on people and the environment
data_points.description: (b) an overview of the process to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor the undertaking's potential and actual impacts on people and the environment, informed by the undertaking's due diligence process, including an explanation of whether and how the process: (i) focusses on specific activities, business relationships, geographies or other factors that give rise to heightened risk of adverse impacts; (ii) considers the impacts with which the undertaking is involved through its own operations or as a result of its business relationships; (iii) includes consultation with affected stakeholders and external experts; (iv) prioritises negative impacts based on severity and likelihood (ESRS 1 section 3.4 Impact materiality) and, if applicable, positive impacts on scale, scope and likelihood, and determines which sustainability matters are material, including thresholds and criteria per ESRS 1 section 3.4.

data_points.name_ko: 부정적 영향 위험이 높은 활동·관계·지역 등에 대한 집중
data_points.name_en: Focus on activities, relationships, geographies or factors giving rise to heightened risk
data_points.description: (b)(i) focusses on specific activities, business relationships, geographies or other factors that give rise to heightened risk of adverse impacts.

data_points.name_ko: 자체 운영 또는 사업적 관계를 통한 관여 영향의 고려
data_points.name_en: Considers impacts involved through own operations or business relationships
data_points.description: (b)(ii) considers the impacts with which the undertaking is involved through its own operations or as a result of its business relationships.

data_points.name_ko: 영향받은 이해관계자 및 외부 전문가와의 협의
data_points.name_en: Consultation with affected stakeholders and external experts
data_points.description: (b)(iii) includes consultation with affected stakeholders to understand how they may be impacted and with external experts.

data_points.name_ko: 부정적·긍정적 영향 우선순위화 및 물질성 판단
data_points.name_en: Prioritises negative and positive impacts and determines materiality
data_points.description: (b)(iv) prioritises negative impacts based on their relative severity and likelihood (see ESRS 1 section 3.4 Impact materiality) and, if applicable, positive impacts on their relative scale, scope and likelihood, and determines which sustainability matters are material for reporting purposes, including the qualitative or quantitative thresholds and other criteria used as prescribed by ESRS 1 section 3.4 Impact materiality.

data_points.name_en: Process to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor risks and opportunities with financial effects
data_points.description: (c) an overview of the process used to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor risks and opportunities that have or may have financial effects. The disclosure shall include: (i) how the undertaking has considered the connections of its impacts and dependencies with the risks and opportunities that may arise from those impacts and dependencies; (ii) how the undertaking assesses the likelihood, magnitude, and nature of effects of the identified risks and opportunities (thresholds and criteria per ESRS 1 section 3.3 Financial materiality); (iii) how the undertaking prioritises sustainability-related risks relative to other types of risks, including its use of risk-assessment tools.

data_points.name_en: Connections of impacts and dependencies with risks and opportunities
data_points.description: (c)(i) how the undertaking has considered the connections of its impacts and dependencies with the risks and opportunities that may arise from those impacts and dependencies.

data_points.name_en: Assessment of likelihood, magnitude and nature of effects
data_points.description: (c)(ii) how the undertaking assesses the likelihood, magnitude, and nature of effects of the identified risks and opportunities (such as the qualitative or quantitative thresholds and other criteria used as prescribed by ESRS 1 section 3.3 Financial materiality).

data_points.name_ko: 지속가능성 관련 리스크의 타 리스크 대비 우선순위
data_points.name_en: Prioritisation of sustainability-related risks relative to other risks
data_points.description: (c)(iii) how the undertaking prioritises sustainability-related risks relative to other types of risks, including its use of risk-assessment tools.

data_points.name_ko: 의사결정 프로세스 및 관련 내부통제 절차
data_points.name_en: Decision-making process and related internal control procedures
data_points.description: (d) a description of the decision-making process and the related internal control procedures.

data_points.name_ko: 영향·리스크 식별·평가·관리 프로세스의 전사 리스크 관리 통합
data_points.name_en: Integration of impacts and risks process into overall risk management
data_points.description: (e) the extent to which and how the process to identify, assess and manage impacts and risks is integrated into the undertaking's overall risk management process and used to evaluate the undertaking's overall risk profile and risk management processes.

data_points.name_ko: 기회 식별·평가·관리 프로세스의 전사 경영 프로세스 통합
data_points.name_en: Integration of opportunities process into overall management (where applicable)
data_points.description: (f) the extent to which and how the process to identify, assess and manage opportunities is integrated into the undertaking's overall management process where applicable.

data_points.name_en: Input parameters used
data_points.description: (g) the input parameters it uses (for example, data sources, the scope of operations covered and the detail used in assumptions).

data_points.name_ko: 이전 기간 대비 변경·최종 수정 시기·향후 개정 일정
data_points.name_en: Whether and how process has changed, when last modified and future revision dates
data_points.description: (h) whether and how the process has changed compared to the prior reporting period, when the process was modified for the last time and future revision dates of the materiality assessment.

data_points.name_ko: 지속가능성 보고서가 다루는 ESRS 공시 요건
data_points.name_en: Disclosure Requirements in ESRS covered by the undertaking's sustainability statement
data_points.description: Para 54: The undertaking shall report on the Disclosure Requirements complied with in its sustainability statements. Para 55 (objective): to provide an understanding of the Disclosure Requirements included in the undertaking's sustainability statement and of the topics that have been omitted as not material, as a result of the materiality assessment.

data_points.name_ko: 준수한 공시 요건 목록 및 부록 B 데이터포인트 표
data_points.name_en: List of Disclosure Requirements complied with and table of datapoints from Appendix B
data_points.description: Para 56: The undertaking shall include a list of the Disclosure Requirements complied with in preparing the sustainability statement, following the outcome of the materiality assessment (see ESRS 1 chapter 3), including the page numbers and/or paragraphs where the related disclosures are located. This may be presented as a content index. The undertaking shall also include a table of all the datapoints that derive from other EU legislation as listed in Appendix B of this standard, indicating where they can be found in the sustainability statement and including those that the undertaking has assessed as not material, in which case the undertaking shall indicate "Not material" in the table in accordance with ESRS 1 paragraph 35.

data_points.name_ko: 기후변화가 물질적이지 않은 경우 상세 설명
data_points.name_en: Detailed explanation when climate change is not material
data_points.description: Para 57: If the undertaking concludes that climate change is not material and therefore omits all disclosure requirements in ESRS E1 Climate change, it shall disclose a detailed explanation of the conclusions of its materiality assessment with regard to climate change (see ESRS 2 IRO-2), including a forward-looking analysis of the conditions that could lead the undertaking to conclude that climate change is material in the future.

data_points.name_ko: 기후변화 외 주제가 물질적이지 않은 경우 간략 설명(선택)
data_points.name_en: Brief explanation when topic other than climate change is not material (optional)
data_points.description: Para 58: If the undertaking concludes that a topic other than climate change is not material and therefore omits all the Disclosure Requirements in the corresponding topical ESRS, it may provide a brief explanation of the conclusions of its materiality assessment for that topic.

data_points.name_ko: 물질적 정보 결정 방식 설명(임계값·ESRS 1 §3.2 기준)
data_points.name_en: Explanation of how material information to be disclosed was determined
data_points.description: Para 59: The undertaking shall provide an explanation of how it has determined the material information to be disclosed in relation to the impacts, risks and opportunities that it has assessed to be material, including the use of thresholds and/or how it has implemented the criteria in ESRS 1 section 3.2 Material matters and materiality of information.

data_points.name_ko: 준수한 공시 요건 목록·목차의 위치 및 표 형태(AR 19)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 19 – List of Disclosure Requirements and content index location
data_points.description: AR 19: Notwithstanding the basis for the presentation of the information about sustainability matters included in ESRS 1 chapter 8, the undertaking may disclose the list of the Disclosure Requirements complied with in preparing the sustainability statement (see paragraph 54) in the general information part or in other parts of the sustainability statement as it deems appropriate. The undertaking may use a content index, i.e., a tabular list of the Disclosure Requirements included in the sustainability statement, with the indication of where they are located (page/paragraphs).

data_points.name_ko: 정책 및 조치에 대한 최소 공시 요건(4.2절)
data_points.name_en: Minimum disclosure requirements on policies and actions (section 4.2)
data_points.description: Para 60: This section sets out minimum disclosure requirements to be included when the undertaking discloses information on its policies and actions to prevent, mitigate and remediate actual and potential material impacts, to address material risks and/or to pursue material opportunities (collectively, to "manage material sustainability matters"). They shall be applied together with the Disclosure Requirements, including Application Requirements, provided in the relevant topical and sector-specific ESRS. They shall also be applied when the undertaking prepares entity-specific disclosures. Para 61: The corresponding disclosures shall be located alongside disclosures prescribed by the relevant ESRS. When a single policy or same actions address several interconnected sustainability matters, the undertaking may disclose the required information in its reporting under one topical ESRS and cross reference to it in its reporting under other topical ESRS. Para 62: If the undertaking cannot disclose the information on policies and actions required under relevant ESRS, because it has not adopted policies and/or actions with reference to the specific sustainability matter concerned, it shall disclose this to be the case, and provide reasons for not having adopted policies and/or actions. The undertaking may disclose a timeframe in which it aims to adopt them.

data_points.name_ko: 물질적 지속가능성 사항 관리를 위한 채택 정책(MDR-P)
data_points.name_en: Policies adopted to manage material sustainability matters (MDR-P)
data_points.description: Para 63: The undertaking shall apply the minimum disclosure requirements defined in this provision when it discloses the policies it has in place with regard to each sustainability matter identified as material. Para 64 (objective): to provide an understanding of the policies that the undertaking has in place to prevent, mitigate and remediate actual and potential impacts, to address risks and to pursue opportunities. Para 65: The undertaking shall disclose information about policies adopted to manage material sustainability matters. The disclosure shall include (a) to (f).

data_points.name_ko: 정책의 주요 내용·일반 목표·관련 영향·리스크·기회·모니터링 절차
data_points.name_en: Key contents of the policy, objectives, which impacts/risks/opportunities, process for monitoring
data_points.description: (a) a description of the key contents of the policy, including its general objectives and which material impacts, risks or opportunities the policy relates to and the process for monitoring.

data_points.name_en: Scope of the policy or exclusions (activities, value chain, geographies, stakeholders)
data_points.description: (b) a description of the scope of the policy, or of its exclusions, in terms of activities, upstream and/or downstream value chain, geographies and if relevant, affected stakeholder groups.

data_points.name_en: Most senior level accountable for implementation of the policy
data_points.description: (c) the most senior level in the undertaking's organisation that is accountable for the implementation of the policy.

data_points.name_ko: 정책 이행을 통해 준수하기로 한 제3자 기준·이니셔티브
data_points.name_en: Reference to third-party standards or initiatives the undertaking commits to respect
data_points.description: (d) a reference, if relevant, to the third-party standards or initiatives the undertaking commits to respect through the implementation of the policy.

data_points.name_ko: 정책 수립 시 핵심 이해관계자 이익 고려
data_points.name_en: Consideration given to the interests of key stakeholders in setting the policy
data_points.description: (e) if relevant, a description of the consideration given to the interests of key stakeholders in setting the policy.

data_points.name_ko: 정책의 이해관계자 제공 여부 및 방법
data_points.name_en: Whether and how the undertaking makes the policy available to potentially affected stakeholders
data_points.description: (f) if relevant, whether and how the undertaking makes the policy available to potentially affected stakeholders, and stakeholders who need to help implement it.

data_points.name_ko: 단일 정책이 여러 topical ESRS에 적용 시 한 섹션 공시·상호참조(AR 20)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 20 – Single policy applying to several matters, cross-reference
data_points.description: AR 20: Due to the interdependency between impacts on people and the environment, risks and opportunities, a single policy may apply to several material sustainability matters, including matters addressed by more than one topical ESRS. For example, if a single policy covers both an environmental matter and a social matter, the undertaking may report on the policy in the environmental section of its sustainability statement. In this case, it should include in the social section a cross-reference to the environmental section where the policy is reported. Equally a policy may be reported in the social section with a cross-reference to it in the environmental section.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 21 – Description of scope of policy, boundaries, value chain extent
data_points.description: AR 21: The description of the scope of the policy may explain which activities and/or segments of the undertaking's own operations or upstream and downstream value chain it concerns. The description may also explain further boundaries relevant to the specific topic or the undertaking's circumstances, which may include geographies, life cycles, etc. In certain cases, such as if the policy does not cover the full value chain, the undertaking may provide clear information regarding the extent of the value chain covered by the policy.

data_points.name_ko: 물질적 지속가능성 사항 관련 조치 및 자원(MDR-A)
data_points.name_en: Actions and resources in relation to material sustainability matters (MDR-A)
data_points.description: Para 66: The undertaking shall apply the requirements for the content of disclosures in this provision when it describes the actions through which it manages each material sustainability matter including action plans and resources allocated and/or planned. Para 67 (objective): to provide an understanding of the key actions taken and/or planned to prevent, mitigate and remediate actual and potential impacts, and to address risks and opportunities, and where applicable achieve the objectives and targets of related policies. Paras 68-69: Where policy requires actions or action plan (or actions without a specific policy), disclose (a)-(e); where action plan requires significant Opex and/or Capex, disclose 69(a)-(c).

data_points.name_ko: 핵심 조치 목록·기대 결과·정책 목표 달성 기여
data_points.name_en: List of key actions, expected outcomes, contribution to policy objectives and targets
data_points.description: (a) the list of key actions taken in the reporting year and planned for the future, their expected outcomes and, where relevant, how their implementation contributes to the achievement of policy objectives and targets.

data_points.name_en: Scope of the key actions
data_points.description: (b) the scope of the key actions (i.e., coverage in terms of activities, upstream and/or downstream value chain, geographies and, where applicable, affected stakeholder groups).

data_points.name_en: Time horizons for completing each key action
data_points.description: (c) the time horizons under which the undertaking intends to complete each key action.

data_points.name_ko: 실제 물질적 영향으로 피해를 입은 자에 대한 구제 관련 조치
data_points.name_en: Key actions to provide for and cooperate in or support the provision of remedy for those harmed
data_points.description: (d) if applicable, key actions taken (along with results) to provide for and cooperate in or support the provision of remedy for those harmed by actual material impacts.

data_points.name_ko: 이전 기간 공시 조치·실행계획 진행 현황(정량·정성)
data_points.name_en: Progress of actions or action plans disclosed in prior periods
data_points.description: (e) if applicable, quantitative and qualitative information regarding the progress of actions or action plans disclosed in prior periods.

data_points.name_ko: 실행계획 관련 현재·미래 재정·기타 자원(지속가능 금융 등)
data_points.name_en: Type of current and future financial and other resources, sustainable finance instruments, preconditions
data_points.description: (a) describe the type of current and future financial and other resources allocated to the action plan, including if applicable, the relevant terms of sustainable finance instruments, such as green bonds, social bonds and green loans, the environmental or social objectives, and whether the ability to implement the actions or action plan depends on specific preconditions, e.g., granting of financial support or public policy and market developments.

data_points.name_ko: 현재 재정 자원 금액 및 재무제표와의 연계
data_points.name_en: Amount of current financial resources and relation to financial statements
data_points.description: (b) provide the amount of current financial resources and explain how they relate to the most relevant amounts presented in the financial statements.

data_points.name_en: Amount of future financial resources
data_points.description: (c) provide the amount of future financial resources.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 22 – Key actions that materially contribute, aggregation
data_points.description: AR 22: Key actions in the context of this Minimum Disclosure Requirement are those actions that materially contribute to achieving the undertaking's objectives in addressing material impacts, risks and opportunities. For reasons of understandability, key actions may be aggregated where appropriate.

data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 23 – Resource allocation in table, Capex/Opex, time horizons
data_points.description: AR 23: Information on resource allocation may be presented in the form of a table and broken down between capital expenditure and operating expenditure, and across the relevant time horizons, and between resources applied in the current reporting year and the planned allocation of resources over specific time horizons.

data_points.name_en: Metrics in relation to material sustainability matters (MDR-M)
