data_points.description: Para 73: The undertaking shall apply the requirements for the content of disclosures in this provision when it discloses on the metrics it has in place with regard to each material sustainability matter. Para 74 (objective): to provide an understanding of the metrics the undertaking uses to track the effectiveness of its actions to manage material sustainability matters. Para 75: The undertaking shall disclose any metrics that it uses to evaluate performance and effectiveness, in relation to a material impact, risk or opportunity. Para 76: Metrics shall include those defined in ESRS, as well as metrics identified on an entity-specific basis, whether taken from other sources or developed by the undertaking itself. Para 77: For each metric, the undertaking shall disclose (a)-(d).

data_points.name_en: Methodologies and significant assumptions behind the metric, including limitations
data_points.description: (a) disclose the methodologies and significant assumptions behind the metric, including the limitations of the methodologies used.

data_points.name_ko: 지표 측정의 외부 검증 여부 및 검증 기관
data_points.name_en: Whether measurement is validated by external body and which body
data_points.description: (b) disclose whether the measurement of the metric is validated by an external body other than the assurance provider and, if so, which body.

data_points.name_en: Label and define the metric using meaningful, clear and precise names and descriptions
data_points.description: (c) label and define the metric using meaningful, clear and precise names and descriptions.

data_points.name_ko: 통화 단위 사용 시 재무제표 표시통화 사용
data_points.name_en: Use presentation currency of financial statements when currency is unit of measure
data_points.description: (d) when currency is specified as the unit of measure, use the presentation currency of its financial statements.

data_points.name_en: Tracking effectiveness of policies and actions through targets (MDR-T)
data_points.description: Para 78: The undertaking shall apply the requirements when it discloses information about the targets it has set with regard to each material sustainability matter. Para 79 (objective): to provide for each material sustainability matter an understanding of (a) whether and how it tracks effectiveness of actions and metrics used; (b) measurable time-bound outcome-oriented targets; (c) overall progress towards adopted targets; (d) if no such targets, whether and how it tracks effectiveness and measures progress; (e) stakeholder involvement in target setting. Paras 80-81: Disclose targets per 80(a)-(j); if no targets set, disclose per 81(a)-(b) including 81(b)(i)-(ii).

data_points.name_en: Relationship of the target to the policy objectives
data_points.description: (a) a description of the relationship of the target to the policy objectives.

data_points.name_en: Defined target level, absolute or relative, unit of measure
data_points.description: (b) the defined target level to be achieved, including, where applicable, whether the target is absolute or relative and in which unit it is measured.

data_points.name_en: Scope of the target
data_points.description: (c) the scope of the target, including the undertaking's activities and/or its upstream and/or downstream value chain where applicable and geographical boundaries.

data_points.name_en: Baseline value and base year
data_points.description: (d) the baseline value and base year from which progress is measured.

data_points.name_en: Period, milestones or interim targets
data_points.description: (e) the period to which the target applies and if applicable, any milestones or interim targets.

data_points.name_en: Methodologies, assumptions, scenario, alignment with policy goals
data_points.description: (f) the methodologies and significant assumptions used to define targets, including where applicable, the selected scenario, data sources, alignment with national, EU or international policy goals and how the targets consider the wider context of sustainable development and/or local situation in which impacts take place.

data_points.name_ko: 환경 목표의 결론적 과학적 근거 여부
data_points.name_en: Whether environmental targets are based on conclusive scientific evidence
data_points.description: (g) whether the undertaking's targets related to environmental matters are based on conclusive scientific evidence.

data_points.name_en: Stakeholder involvement in target setting
data_points.description: (h) whether and how stakeholders have been involved in target setting for each material sustainability matter.

data_points.name_en: Changes in targets, metrics, methodologies; rationale and effect on comparability
data_points.description: (i) any changes in targets and corresponding metrics or underlying measurement methodologies, significant assumptions, limitations, sources and processes to collect data adopted within the defined time horizon. This includes an explanation of the rationale for those changes and their effect on comparability (see Disclosure Requirement BP-2).

data_points.name_ko: 공시 목표 대비 실적·모니터링·계획 대비 진행·추세 분석
data_points.name_en: Performance against disclosed targets, monitoring, progress vs plan, trends
data_points.description: (j) the performance against its disclosed targets, including information on how the target is monitored and reviewed and the metrics used, whether the progress is in line with what had been initially planned, and an analysis of trends or significant changes in the performance of the undertaking towards achieving the target.

data_points.name_ko: 측정 가능한 결과 지향 목표 미설정 시 설정 예정·시한 또는 미설정 사유
data_points.name_en: Whether targets will be set and timeframe, or reasons for not planning to set targets
data_points.description: (a) it may disclose whether such targets will be set and the timeframe for setting them, or the reasons why the undertaking does not plan to set such targets.

data_points.name_ko: 목표 미설정 시에도 효과 추적 여부 및 방법
data_points.name_en: Whether and how it tracks effectiveness without measurable targets
data_points.description: (b) it shall disclose whether it nevertheless tracks the effectiveness of its policies and actions in relation to the material sustainability-related impact, risk and opportunity, and if so: (i) any processes through which it does so; (ii) the defined level of ambition to be achieved and any qualitative or quantitative indicators it uses to evaluate progress, including the base period from which progress is measured.

data_points.name_en: Processes through which it tracks effectiveness
data_points.description: (i) any processes through which it does so.

data_points.name_en: Level of ambition and qualitative or quantitative indicators, base period
data_points.description: (ii) the defined level of ambition to be achieved and any qualitative or quantitative indicators it uses to evaluate progress, including the base period from which progress is measured.

data_points.name_ko: 환경 목표 절대·상대 우선·사회 목표 인권·후생 등(AR 24)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 24 – Environmental targets absolute vs relative; social in terms of human rights, welfare
data_points.description: AR 24: When disclosing targets related to the prevention or mitigation of environmental impacts, the undertaking shall prioritise targets related to the reduction of the impacts in absolute terms rather than in relative terms. When targets address the prevention or mitigation of social impacts, they may be specified in terms of the effects on human rights, welfare or positive outcomes for affected stakeholders.

data_points.name_ko: 목표 달성 진행 현황의 종합 표(기준·목표값·마일스톤·실적)(AR 25)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 25 – Progress towards targets in comprehensive table
data_points.description: AR 25: The information on progress made towards achieving the targets may be presented in a comprehensive table, including information on the baseline and target value, milestones, and achieved performance over the prior periods.

data_points.name_ko: 측정 가능 목표 없이 정책 목표 진행 시 기준·평가(AR 26)
data_points.name_en: Application Requirement 26 – Progress in absence of measurable target, baseline and assessment
data_points.description: AR 26: Where the undertaking describes progress in achieving the objectives of a policy in the absence of a measurable target, it may specify a baseline against which the progress is considered. For example, the undertaking may assess an increase of wages by a certain percentage for those below a fair wage; or may assess the quality of its relationships with local communities by reference to the proportion of issues raised by communities that were resolved to their satisfaction. The baseline and the assessment of the progress shall be related to the impacts, risks and opportunities which underpin the materiality of the matter addressed by the policy.
